name: Low Fat Pizza Dough
recipeIngredient: Add more water as needed, to taste
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Katie E Green
NOTE: Minced, pour boiling water to soften, drain
1. Place ingredients in bread machine according to manufacturer's directions.
2. Process on Dough Cycle.
3. Preheat oven to 450°F.
4. Remove dough from machine at end of cycle and divide into two portions.
5. Roll two 10-inch circles on a floured board and place on baking sheets dusted with cornmeal.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until browned.
